calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 23, 2015 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondents/Plaintiffs Cristina O'Brien and Kevin O'Brien.
Bryndis Tobin, Esq. (415-786-3815), counsel appears for Appellant/Defendant Five Years From Now, Inc..

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Counsel Bryndis Tobin informed the Court that the case has been settled by the parties and submit the settlement agreememt to the Court.
The Court noted thant case is settled.
Matters is submitted.

Clerk inform counsel that her request for dismissal (CIV-110) form will be forwarded to Small Claims Court.

Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Jul-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 4, 2015 in Department 525:
All parties are not present.

Court continued the matters to July 23, 2015 at 9am in Dept. 525 per stipulation filed on May 27, 2015 signed by the parties. No further continuances will be granted.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Judgment Entered
